label: Arrur
description: Arrur is the brutal, highland-dominated homeworld of the orcs, shaped by ancient godly wounds and massive geological violence. It features sheer cliffs dropping into furious oceans, high-altitude deserts, volcanic plains, and myth-laden landmarks. Society revolves around strength, survival, and fortified cities like Bloodrift, which import destructive tech and export mercenaries, war materials, and magical arms.
genre: God-Scarred Mythology, Highland Brutalism, Mercenary Frontier, Volcanic War Epic

about.label: Arrur
about.description: A high-gravity planet with extreme vertical geography, hostile oceans, and a culture built on war, survival, and myth. Ancient gods are said to have physically shaped the planet by biting it, leaving massive cliffs, frozen peaks, and cursed rivers.

locationCreated.label: Bloodrift
locationCreated.description: A vertical fortress-city carved into the cliff walls of a massive canyon. Imports destructive technology via spaceport and exports war goods, mercenaries, and enchanted arms. Features include the Mawport, Chainmarkets, Clutch, Redsteel Hall, and Blackcradle.

hasPart.label: Bloodrift
hasPart.description: A militarized trade hub and vertical city, central to Arrur's economy and warfare culture.

hasPart.label: Teeth of Gorthuun
hasPart.description: Jagged frozen mountains believed to be the fossilized teeth of the death god Gorthuun. Magic fails in their presence.

hasPart.label: Hollow of the Last Joke
hasPart.description: Sunken toxic marsh where the trickster god Zugthak fell. The source of the cursed river Thakza’s Grin, said to originate from his shattered, still-living heart deep underground.

hasPart.label: Thakza’s Grin
hasPart.description: A shimmering but toxic river that carries slow death and corruption from the Hollow of the Last Joke across the highlands. Said to be Zugthak's laughter made liquid.

hasPart.label: Korvhal
hasPart.description: Ancient mesa city with triple walls and deep wells. Known for its stability and trade routes through the highlands.

hasPart.label: Skarth’s Hollow
hasPart.description: Collapsed highland town known for cliff wrestling and obsidian trade. Surrounded by stone and bone palisades.

hasPart.label: Ashcross
hasPart.description: Volcanic plain town fortified with black slag bricks. Produces hardy crops and livestock.

hasPart.label: Drowned Bastion
hasPart.description: Storm-battered cliffside city used as a penal colony and pirate port.
